basis: be gracious / show mercy / plead: gracious favour disposition (affect) enacted as bestowing grace (volition)
Aramaic 'be gracious / show mercy / plea': gracious disposition + bestowal
cha.sad 'be kind/merciful': kindness as affective disposition of steadfast loyal love
cha.sad homonym glossed 'to shame' but senses are 'merciful'; classified by attested senses = kindness/loyal-love affect
che.sed 'steadfast love/kindness': loyal covenant love = affective bond + relational loyalty capacity
che.sed sub-entry (senses steadfast love/kindness): loyal-love affect + relational loyalty
cha.sah 'to seek refuge/take refuge': act of trust-as-commitment, turning to take shelter = volition
cha.sid 'pious/godly/merciful': the loyal-loving (chesed) person = affective loyal-love disposition
cha.san 'to hoard': storing up = physical/transfer ACT
cha.phets 'to delight in': emotion of delight = affect
cha.phets 'delighting/to delight in': affective delight (willing shade, core delight)
cha.pher 'be ashamed/disgraced/confounded': shame = affect with conscience-before-standard aspect
cha.rad 'to tremble/be afraid': fear emotion = affect
cha.rah 'to be incensed/angry/burned': anger emotion = affect
cho.ri 'burning/heat of anger, fierce': anger heat = affect
cha.raph 'to taunt/mock/reproach': verbal act against another = speech ACT toward external pole
cha.rash 'to plow/devise': in 'devise' sense = scheming/planning cognition (homograph with plow=physical)
cha.resh 'be quiet/silent/peace': silence = STATE/act of keeping silent
cha.shav 'to devise: design/skillfully': designing = cognition + creative origination of design
cha.shav 'to devise: devise/planned': devising plans = cognition + creativity
cha.shah 'be silent/keep quiet': act/state of silence
cha.shaq homonym 'to connect' but senses love/desired/heart: classified by attested senses = desire affect
cha.tat 'to be dismayed/terrified/broken': dismay/fear emotion = affect
cha.tat 'terror/calamity': in terror sense = affect (calamity shade is event)
ta.her 'be pure/cleansed/cleanse': becoming/making clean = STATE/ritual act
tov 'good/pleasant/better': value-judgement good-vs-better = moral_evaluation; pleasant shade = affect
ta.me 'to defile/unclean': ritual/moral impurity STATE / defiling act
ta.phash 'be insensitive/fat (of heart)': dullness of mind = impaired cognition
ya.al 'be foolish/lack sense': folly = defect of cognition; carries moral_evaluation vs wisdom standard
yad 'hand: owner/rule': hand/possession-rule = THING (body part / metonym)
ye.da 'to praise/give thanks' (Aramaic): thanksgiving/praise = expressive ACT
ya.dah 'to give thanks/acknowledge/confess': verbal confession/thanks = speech ACT
ya.da 'to know': knowing = cognition; experiential knowing also perception
ya.chil 'waiting/wait': hopeful waiting = patient volition/expectant trust
ya.chal 'to wait: wait': expectant waiting = volition (sustained orientation)
ya.chal 'to wait: hope': hope = expectant affect + volitional orientation
ya.eph 'to faint/weary/exhausted': physical exhaustion = bodily STATE
ya.re 'to fear: revere/afraid/fear': fear/reverence emotion = affect
ya.re 'to fear: revere/awesome': reverent fear = affect
ye.shu.ah 'salvation/deliverance': deliverance = event/STATE acted by another
yo.sher 'uprightness/upright': moral rectitude vs standard = moral_evaluation
ya.shar 'upright: straight/safe': entry is upright/right family = moral_evaluation (literal straight = physical)
ka.av 'to pain/grieved': pain/grief = affect (also physical pain shade)
ka.ved 'to honor: heavy/hardened/harden': heavy/hardened sense = STATE (weight/hardness)
ka.ved 'to honor: many/multiply/abounding': abundance = quantity STATE
ka.ved 'to honor: dull/stopped': dullness of ear/eye = impaired physical STATE
ka.vod 'glory/honor/glorious': as esteem-regard = affect, but largely an attribute
ka.na 'be humble/subdued/humbled': being humbled/subduing self = volitional submission (often externally subdued)
ka.sal 'be stupid/foolish': stupidity/folly = defect of cognition
kis.lah 'confidence/folly': confidence-as-trust = volitional reliance (folly shade mixed)
kip.per 'to atone/make atonement': cultic atonement = ritual ACT
ka.phar 'to cover/make atonement': covering/atoning = ritual/physical ACT
ka.rat 'to cut: make [covenant]': covenant-making = legal/relational ACT producing a covenant THING
ka.tat 'to crush/beat to pieces': physical crushing = physical ACT
la.ah 'be weary/wearied': weariness as dispiritedness = affect (also physical fatigue shade)
lev 'heart': inner-being SEAT operating thought, conscience, perception, will
la.vav 'to encourage/understanding/heart': denominative of heart = to hearten (affect) / understanding (cognition)
le.vav 'heart/mind' (Aramaic): inner-being seat operating the faculties
lib.bah 'heart': inner-being seat operating the faculties
la.chash 'charm/whispered prayer': whispered incantation = speech/ritual ACT
la.shan 'to slander': slandering = speech ACT against another
me.gu.rah 'fear' (senses barn/fears; homonym): in fear sense = affect
mu.tsaq 'constraint/anguish/cramping': anguish = affect (also physical constraint shade)
mich.yah 'recovery/reviving/preserve life': preservation of life = event/STATE
me.chit.tah 'terror/horror/ruin': terror = affect (ruin shade is event)
ma.no.ach 'resting/resting place/rest': place/state of rest = THING/STATE
ma.al 'be unfaithful/committed treachery/broke': act of treachery/breach = ACT/RECORD of wrongdoing
ma.al 'unfaithfulness/treachery/faithlessness': the breach = RECORD/STATE of wrongdoing
miph.la.ah 'wonder/wondrous works': wonder/marvel = affect (amazement); largely wondrous works = deeds
mar 'bitter/bitterness/deeply': bitterness of soul = affect (corrected from cur moral_evaluation)
ma.rad 'to rebel/rebelled': rebellion = volitional refusal/defiance of authority
mir.mah 'deceit/deceitful/deceitfully': the act of deceiving = speech/ACT of treachery
ma.rar 'to provoke/bitter/bitter distress/rage': to be/make bitter, rage = affect
ma.ror 'bitterness/bitter herbs': literal bitter herbs/taste = THING/physical (homonym)
mir.sha.at 'wickedness/wicked woman': wickedness vs standard = moral_evaluation
mish.a.lah 'petition/desires': desires/petition = affect (desire); request shade = speech
mish.bar 'wave/breakers': sea waves = physical THING (M01 metaphor, lemma = wave)
ma.shal 'to rule/ruler/rules': governing = ACT/role, external authority
mish.pat 'justice: custom/manner/way': in justice family; custom shade weaker but entry = justice
na.eh 'lovely/fitting/becoming': loveliness/aesthetic value = affect (cur perception removed)
na.ats 'to spurn/despise/spurned': spurning = ACT of contempt toward external pole
na.aq 'to groan': groaning = vocal/physical expression = ACT
ne.a.qah 'groan/groaning': groaning as expressed distress = affect (suffering)
na.vel 'to wither/lost heart/withers': withering = physical decay STATE
ne.va.lah 'folly/outrageous thing': moral outrage/disgraceful folly vs standard = moral_evaluation
nav.lut 'lewdness': shamelessness conduct = STATE (cur affect doubtful)
na.ga.s 'to oppress/hard pressed/taskmasters': oppressing/driving = external ACT
na.dav 'be willing/willingly/freewill offerings': willingness/voluntary giving = volition
na.dad 'to wander/fled/fugitive': wandering/fleeing = physical movement ACT
na.div 'noble/prince': a noble person = PERSON/rank (cur volition wrong)
na.ham 'to groan': groaning = vocal ACT of pain
na.ham 'roaring': roaring of lion/sea = physical sound event
nush 'be sick/despair': in sense 'despair' = affect (sickness shade physical)
na.cham 'to be sorry: comfort/comforted': comforting = affect
na.cham 'to be sorry: relent/regret': relenting/regret = affect (sorrow) + change of resolve = volition
na.tar 'to keep anger/grudge/keepers': bearing a grudge = sustained resentment affect
na.kheh 'crippled/contrite': crippled = physical STATE (contrite shade weak)
na.phach 'to breathe/blow/boiling': breathing/blowing = physical ACT (cur perception wrong)
na.phal 'to fall: angry/fell/anger': 'face fell = angry/dejected' sense = affect
ne.phesh 'soul/heart': inner-being seat carrying desire/appetite (affect) and willing self (volition)
ne.phesh 'soul: life/breath': here = life/vitality = STATE (biological life)
ne.phesh 'soul: myself/himself': reflexive self = PERSON/pronoun usage
ne.phesh 'soul: person/people': a person/people count = PERSON
ne.phesh 'soul: animal/creature': a living creature = animate being/THING
ne.phesh 'soul: dead/bodies': a corpse = physical THING
ne.phesh 'soul: neck': body part = physical THING
na.tsah 'to struggle/quarreled/fight/strive': strife/fighting = external conflict ACT
na.tsach 'to conduct/perpetual': directing music / perpetuity = ACT/STATE
na.qah 'to clear/free/innocent/leave unpunished': being innocent/cleared = conscience (guiltlessness)
qe.ha.von 'bluntness' (sense innocence; homonym): primary 'bluntness' = physical STATE
na.sa 'to lift: trust / lift up the soul': trust/long-for sense = volition (trust-as-commitment) with longing affect
sod 'counsel/council/secret/company': confidential counsel/deliberation = cognition (also council group)
sur 'to turn aside: remove/removed': removing = physical ACT
sur 'to turn aside: depart/turned away': turning away from the way = volitional departure (physical shade)
sur 'to turn aside: turn aside': turning aside from the way/evil = volitional deviation (physical shade)
sur 'degenerate/turn away': moral degeneracy = STATE of decline
sa.lach 'to forgive/forgiven/pardon': forgiving = act of pardon (God's) = ACT
sal.lach 'forgiving': attribute of one who pardons = STATE/act
sa.laph 'to pervert/overthrows/subverts/ruin': perverting/overthrowing = ACT of distortion
a.vad 'to serve/served/became subject': serving = ACT (also relational service)
a.vad 'to serve: labour/laborer/works': labour = physical ACT
a.vad 'to serve: burden/burdened': being burdened with labour = STATE/physical
ud 'to testify/warned/give warning': testifying/warning = speech ACT
a.vah 'to twist/perverted/bowed down': twisting/bending = physical/moral distortion ACT
a.vah 'to pervert/acted perversely/wrong': acting perversely = ACT of wrongdoing
a.vil 'unjust one/ungodly': an unjust person = PERSON/moral type
a.val 'to act unjustly/deals corruptly': acting unjustly = ACT of wrongdoing
av.val 'unjust/unrighteous': an unjust one = PERSON/moral type
a.von 'iniquity: crime/iniquities/guilt': iniquity = RECORD of wrongdoing
a.von 'iniquity: guilt/guilty': here 'guilt' = recorded culpability = RECORD (objective, not the conscience-feeling)
a.von 'iniquity: punishment/chastisement': punishment for iniquity = external consequence
uq 'to totter': tottering/swaying = physical movement STATE
a.zaz 'be strong/prevail/bold': being strong/prevailing = STATE/physical-prevailing ACT
a.mal 'trouble/toil/mischief': the trouble/misery shade = affect (felt hardship); toil shade = physical
